DEATH_DT 

Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
ACO Pioneer V2 Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.1 6 

DEATH_DT 

LABEL: Date of Death 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates the date of death of the beneficiary. A null value means that no death date was 
reported for the beneficiary. 

SHORT NAME: DEATH_DT 

LONG NAME: DEATH_DT 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS Aligned Beneficiary Pioneer ACO RIF 

VALUES: Format is DDMMMCCYY 

COMMENT: —
